---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or action for TapCraft
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Describe the Feature
A clear description of what you'd like.

## Use Case
Why would this be useful? How would you use it?

## Proposed Config
How might this look in `config.yaml`?

```yaml
  center:
    double:
      action: your-new-action
      value: "..."
      label: "Description"
```

## Platform
Which platforms should this support?
- [ ] macOS
- [ ] Windows
- [ ] Linux

## Would You Like to Implement This?
- [ ] Yes, I'd like to submit a PR
- [ ] I'd like help implementing it
- [ ] Just an idea for someone else to pick up
